evidence_edges.claim: the trust ladder: rungs are bdo's to grant, denied until admitted
the herald mints a content-hash credential at the floor rank for a named agent
the registry carries forbidden-decision rules (e.g. raw git push)
observe.gate() is the consequence-gate: an under-declared act HALTS
the gate skill composes a mortal headless judge's context
the PIPELINE value-gate stage is still a fixed-verdict mock — realness is per-stage
the command guard compiles its deny-rules from the fence registry
the write guard refuses a non-carbon records write with the divergences named
the healing fold detects a stale-park bite and proposes the heal
the Fold computes every atom's state from the append-only log
append_line is the line-atomic, torn-tail-tolerant write to the log
the patrol arms an escalate marker for what genuinely needs bdo
the activity fold accounts for and witnesses every hook's firing
judge() is the one pen by which a summoned node writes its verdict
authorize() is the PEP — default-deny over the admitted policy set
the policy enforcement point is default-deny by construction
claims a threshold module that nobody has written — the named-only layer

gaps.move: fix the citation, or drop the claim — a stale citation reads as a ghost backing
gaps.why: threshold cites 'loop/threshold.py' containing 'def threshold', which does not resolve on disk

gaps.move: ground it or retire it; it is not minted
gaps.why: threshold claims a backing that resolves nowhere

gaps.move: the evidence wins; correct the declaration
gaps.why: threshold is declared 'minted-runtime' but the evidence resolves to 'ghost'

source: the repo is truth; this is a fold, not a record

terms.global_meaning: The first of the three A's (authenticated, authorized, attributed) bounds verify — governance, never location.
terms.local_meaning: The gateway floor: who is speaking, established before any decision. The trust ladder denies every class everything until a rung is admitted (bdo grants), and the herald mints a content-hash credential at the floor rank for a named agent.
must_not_mean: a password check bolted on (it is a standing, log-derived rung, not a session secret)

terms.global_meaning: Physical, actor-blind: a closed loop round a territory you can see through but cannot pass — touching the seam bites.
terms.local_meaning: The family-neutral firm denials every engineering surface meets: a registry of forbidden argv prefixes (raw git push, raw gh mutations) rendered into each harness's native enforcement.
must_not_mean: a per-session ACL (it is a standing registry, one rule rendered to two surfaces)

terms.global_meaning: A gate judges a CONSEQUENCE before it is admitted — distinct from a guard's actor-blind block; some gates are real, some pipeline stages still mock.
terms.local_meaning: A real judging position: observe.gate() halts an under-declared exploratory act (the consequence-gate forced first), and the gate skill launches a mortal headless judge that lands one verdict through the one pen. The PIPELINE value-gate stage is still a mock.
must_not_mean: the same thing as a guard (a guard blocks by rule; a gate judges)

terms.global_meaning: A guard is a GATE in the per-directory stack — actor-blind enforcement at the tool seam, the deny IS the fail notification.
terms.local_meaning: The harness hook that denies a forbidden command (exit 2 + reason on stderr) and refuses a non-carbon records write; it derives its deny-list from the fence registry at runtime.
must_not_mean: a linter (it BLOCKS; a deny is exit 2, not a warning)

terms.global_meaning: Teeth without a healing reflex is autoimmunity; heal is the recovery layer that keeps the gates honest.
terms.local_meaning: The counterforce to the teeth: the healing fold senses where a tooth bit wrong or went stale (stale-park, flapping-gate, owner-override) and proposes the heal.
must_not_mean: an actuator (it proposes the heal; it never clears a park or re-opens a verdict)

terms.global_meaning: The spine the whole stack writes onto and reads back from; history is never retro-invalidated.
terms.local_meaning: The append-only log under everything: the Fold computes all state, and append_line is the line-atomic, torn-tail-tolerant write — the log is truth, everything else is a fold.
must_not_mean: a database with mutable rows (it is append-only; never edit a line, only append)

terms.global_meaning: The witness asymmetry — see through the gate, but the patrol sees you — turned on the harness's own metabolism.
terms.local_meaning: The watching layer: the patrol arms an escalate marker when work needs bdo, and the activity fold witnesses every hook's firing (reads get witnessed, not authorized).
must_not_mean: an authorizer (the patrol witnesses and escalates; it does not grant)

terms.global_meaning: A pen is where authority is exercised on the record; every act leaves a receipt.
terms.local_meaning: The one writing seam: a summoned node writes its verdict through loop.node judge — the single write path, no second one.
must_not_mean: any code that appends to the log (the pen is the GOVERNED single write path, not a raw append)

terms.global_meaning: Govern what the world may BECOME, set by the owner; an explicit deny wins, attribution required.
terms.local_meaning: The inference gateway's policy enforcement point: default-deny RBAC over an admitted policy set — no (caller, surface, mind) thinks until a rule admits it.
must_not_mean: a config flag (it is an admitted, log-read policy set, not a code constant)

terms.global_meaning: Claimed as a gateway layer; cited backing resolves nowhere, so it is a ghost until something real carries it.
terms.local_meaning: Named in the per-directory gateway stack between guard/gate and the pen, but it has no resolving code on disk — a placeholder layer.
must_not_mean: a real, enforced layer (no module implements it — it is named only)
